HOZATANZANIASAFARIS-«Beyond the Horizon. Into the Wild.» (Adventurous and cinematic)

Hoza Tanzania Safaris invites you to step beyond the ordinary and into the breathtaking heart of Africa. From the endless golden plains of the Serengeti to the snow-capped peaks of Kilimanjaro, Tanzania is a land of wonders unlike any other — and we are here to make every moment of your journey unforgettable. Whether you are witnessing the Great Migration, tracking the Big Five through Ngorongoro Crater, or unwinding on the pristine shores of Zanzibar, our expert guides and carefully crafted itineraries ensure a safari experience that is as seamless as it is extraordinary. At Hoza Tanzania Safaris, we don’t just show you Tanzania — we bring it to life.

«Your African Dream Starts Here — Welcome to Hoza Tanzania Safaris»

«We are not just a travel company — we are your family in Tanzania. Local knowledge, honest prices, unforgettable memories. From the moment you land to the moment you leave, Hoza Tanzania Safaris is by your side every step of the way.»

· Who We Are ·

A Company Built on Passion & Pride

Hoza Tanzania Safaris is not just a travel company — it is a promise. A promise that every journey you take with us will be real, personal, and deeply connected to the land and the people who call it home.

From the moment your boots hit the red soil of the Serengeti to the moment you watch the sun melt into the Indian Ocean from the shores of Zanzibar — we are with you, guiding, sharing, and ensuring every single moment exceeds your highest expectations.

Certified professional guides born & raised in Tanzania
Custom-built 4×4 Land Cruisers with pop-up roofs
All-inclusive packages tailored to your budget
24/7 support before, during and after your trip
Committed to responsible, sustainable tourism
Our Story Meet the Team

Where Giants Still Roam Free

Tanzania is home to the largest elephant population in East Africa. On every game drive with Hoza Tanzania Safaris, moments like these are not the exception — they are the rule.

· What We Offer ·

Three Ways to Experience Tanzania

Whether you want the thrill of the wild, the peace of the ocean, or the challenge of the mountain — Hoza Tanzania Safaris has your perfect journey waiting.

Safari & Wildlife
The Wild Plains of Tanzania
Game drives, walking safaris, bird watching and the greatest wildlife spectacle on earth — the Great Migration.
Camps & Lodges
Sleep Under African Stars
Luxury tented camps in the heart of the Serengeti. Wake to birdsong, sleep to the sound of the wild.
Culture & Nature
Ancient Land, Living Stories
Baobab trees that have stood for two thousand years. Maasai traditions that have never changed. Tanzania will move your soul.
· Incredible Encounters ·

Wildlife Like You’ve Never Seen Before

Tanzania is one of the last places on earth where wildlife exists in such extraordinary abundance. Every single game drive is different. Every morning brings a new story.

Big FiveAfrican Elephant
BirdsSuperb Starling
Baby AnimalsBaby Warthog
WildlifeMasai Giraffe
PrimatesVervet Monkey
BirdsRed-Billed Hornbill
NewbornsEland & Newborn Calf
Rare BirdsSouthern Ground Hornbill
WildlifeWarthog Family

We are not just a travel company — we are your family in Tanzania. From the moment you land to the moment you leave, Hoza Tanzania Safaris is beside you every single step of the way. Your memory is our mission.

— Hoza Tanzania Safaris · Dar es Salaam, Tanzania
River Life Hippo Pools of the Ruaha
Drama of the Plains Zebras at the Edge of the Storm
· The Hoza Difference ·

Every Road Leads to Something Extraordinary

Tanzania has over 38 national parks and game reserves. Most tourists see three. With Hoza Tanzania Safaris, we open up the routes less travelled — the dirt tracks where no other vehicle has been that morning, the hidden waterholes where lions drink at dawn, the acacia forests where elephants disappear like ghosts.

Our guides don’t follow a script. They follow their instincts, their knowledge, and their genuine love for this land. That is what makes every single Hoza safari completely unique — and completely unforgettable.

Browse Our Trips
· The Hoza Promise ·

What You Can Always Count On

01
Local Expertise

Every guide, driver and team member at Hoza Tanzania Safaris is Tanzanian. We know this land because we live it every single day. That local knowledge is something no foreign operator can ever replicate.

02
Tailored Journeys

We don’t believe in one-size-fits-all packages. Whether you are a solo traveller, a honeymooning couple, a family with young children or a group of photographers — your trip is built around you, your pace and your passions.

03
Responsible Travel

We operate with deep respect for Tanzania’s ecosystems, communities and wildlife. A portion of every booking directly supports local conservation projects and community development programmes across the regions we visit.

Plan Your Perfect Trip with Our Travel Experts.

Discover the world your way with a trip designed just for you. Whether it’s strolling through historic cities, relaxing on pristine beaches, or venturing into the great outdoors, we’ll craft an itinerary that matches your style and pace. Our experts handle the planning so you can focus on enjoying the journey.

From handpicked accommodations to insider recommendations, every detail is thoughtfully arranged. No matter if you’re traveling solo, as a couple, or with family, we’ll ensure your experience is seamless, stress-free, and unforgettable.

Journery

.

Hozatanzania Safaris – Discover lands that change you forever.

The Serengeti at sunrise is something that cannot be described — only felt. The air is cool and golden, the grass glows like copper, and somewhere in the distance a lion calls. This is the Tanzania we know. This is the Tanzania we want you to experience. Every game drive with Hoza Tanzania Safaris is guided by people who have spent their entire lives in this wilderness — people who know where the cheetahs hunt, where the elephants cross at dusk, and where to find the silence that the rest of the world has forgotten

FAQ

Freequently Asked Questions.

Get clear answers to common queries to help you plan and enjoy your experience with ease.

Who is Hoza Tanzania Safaris?

Hoza Tanzania Safaris is a locally owned and operated tourism company based in Tanzania. We are a passionate team of local experts dedicated to giving you the most authentic and unforgettable African experience possible.

How long has Hoza Tanzania Safaris been operating?

We have years of experience operating tours and safaris across Tanzania. Our local knowledge and passion for this land is what sets us apart from other operators.

Why should I choose Hoza Tanzania Safaris over other companies?

We are local — born and raised in Tanzania. We offer honest prices, expert local guides, personalized service and genuine care for every guest. When you travel with us you are not just a customer — you are family.

Is Hoza Tanzania Safaris licensed and registered?

Yes, Hoza Tanzania Safaris is fully licensed and registered with the Tanzania Tourism Board and all relevant authorities. You can travel with us with complete confidence and peace of mind

Can Hoza Tanzania Safaris arrange my Zanzibar trip?

Absolutely! Every trip we offer can be fully customized to match your budget, dates, interests and group size. Just tell us what you want and we will build the perfect itinerary for you.

Our success rate is very high because we use longer routes with better acclimatization. The Machame route (7 days) has the highest success rate and most scenic views.

Hoza Tanzania Safaris is your trusted local partner for unforgettable adventures across Tanzania’s most breathtaking landscapes. Whether you dream of witnessing the Great Migration in the Serengeti, exploring the stunning Ngorongoro Crater, trekking the majestic Mount Kilimanjaro, or relaxing on the pristine beaches of Zanzibar, we tailor every journey to your preferences. With experienced guides, well-maintained vehicles, and a deep commitment to responsible tourism, we ensure your safari is safe, comfortable, and truly authentic. Let us show you the heart of Africa — Karibu Tanzania (Welcome to Tanzania)!
